[
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "14FF00",
    "name": "Clear Diagnostic Information",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "GroupOfdiagnosticInformation": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "7BDA",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3BADFF000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "name": "Ecriture IMA : correction injecteurs",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 10
